mapper.update: update short_link_db..approver_config set campaign_type = #{campaignType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approver_id = #{approverId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, approver_level = #{approverLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, campaign_type, approver_id, approver_level, create_time, update_time from short_link_db..approver_config
